retry_reason: Failure (NULL) indicates the requested task info does not exist for the given pasid; retrying the same pasid is not productive without a change in state.
contract_summary: This wrapper acquires a reference on the amdgpu_task_info associated with a given pasid. It returns a pointer to the task info with its refcount incremented. The caller must release the reference by calling the corresponding put function (e.g., amdgpu_vm_put_task_info) when done. On failure, it returns NULL, indicating the task info was not found; the caller should not use the returned pointer and must not call put on it. The function does not perform any additional side effects or state changes.
